The Shop

Start with a base, make it yours

Choose a ready-made style or design one from scratch in the hat bar. Either way, you finish it your way.

Bestseller Black Cowboy $147.50

Vegan suede, unisex, structured crown. Sizes M (56–58cm) & L (58–60cm). Add your ribbon, charms and branding.

Customise this hat
Design your own

The Rancher

Start from a blank base and choose from 80+ felt colours on the wall, then layer on everything you love.

Open the designer
The Hat Designer

From base to brim, burning to bling.

Design your hat online: choose your base and colour, drag on feathers, dried florals, charms and chains, then add a hand-burned name. We build exactly what you see, by hand.

Open the Hat Designer
How it works

Three steps to your hat

1

Pick your base

Cowboy or Rancher in vegan suede, then your felt colour from 80+ on the wall.

2

Make it yours

Bands and ribbons to match any vibe, plus feathers, dried florals, charms, pins and hundreds of chains.

3

Branded & burned

We hand-burn your name, initials or a date. Pick it up in Kamloops or wear it out the door.

Start designing
Parties & events

Throw a hat bar party

Bachelorettes, birthdays, girls’ weekends and corporate nights. Every guest designs and builds their own hat to take home, and we bring the felt, the bling and the good time.

BacheloretteBirthdayCorporatePrivate groups

Pricing is by custom quote, tailored to your group size and vibe.

Meet us

Nashville-style hats, made in the Interior

Saddle N Spurs brought the custom hat bar experience to Kamloops, BC. Every hat is shaped, styled and burned by hand, so no two are ever alike. Come build yours, or bring the whole crew.
